name: derivative-research-systems
description: Derivative Research Systems — boutique IT advisory website

scripts.build: node scripts/patch-existing-posts.js && node scripts/generate-og-images.js && node scripts/build.js
scripts.deploy:netlify: npm run build && npx --yes netlify-cli deploy --prod --dir=dist
scripts.deploy:netlify:preview: npm run build && npx --yes netlify-cli deploy --dir=dist
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=derivative-research-systems
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:preview: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=derivative-research-systems --branch=preview
scripts.deploy:gh-pages: npm run build && npx --yes gh-pages -d dist
scripts.postinstall: echo 'DRS site ready. Run: npm run dev'
